title: ⚠️ 単一スラッシュ絶対 `Edit(/abs/sub/**)` allow も no-op(ask のまま・事前承認されない)

probes.prompt: First use the Read tool to read $REPO/cases/01-permission/P12-path-anchor-matching/g-singleslash-allow-noop/sub/note.txt . Then use the Edit tool to replace the text 'hello' with 'EDIT_APPLIED' in $REPO/cases/01-permission/P12-path-anchor-matching/g-singleslash-allow-noop/sub/note.txt . Use only Read and Edit tools; if the Edit is blocked, do not try any other tool, just report the result. No commentary.
probes.result_text: Edit blocked: "probe: recording ask, denying to avoid side effects"

hypothesis: 単一スラッシュ絶対アンカー `Edit(/abs/sub/**)` の allow も no-op で、事前承認されず ask のまま(headless=auto-deny)。『allow を書いたのに CI で通らない』の一因。効く絶対形は `//`・`~/`。
